scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.audit:moderate: npm --prefix backend audit --audit-level=moderate && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run audit:moderate
scripts.postinstall: npm i --prefix backend && npm i --prefix frontend
